en: In the first book, O Theophilus, I have dealt with all that Jesus began to do and teach,
zh: 提阿非羅先生：我已經寫了前書，敘述耶穌開始所行所教的一切，

en: until the day when he was taken up, after he had given commands through the Holy Spirit to the apostles whom he had chosen.
zh: 一直到他藉著聖靈吩咐所揀選的使徒之後，被接上升的日子為止。

en: To them he presented himself alive after his suffering by many proofs, appearing to them during forty days and speaking about the kingdom of God.
zh: 他受難以後，用許多憑據向使徒顯示自己是活著的。他向使徒顯現，並且講論 神的國的事，有四十天之久。

en: And while staying with them he ordered them not to depart from Jerusalem, but to wait for the promise of the Father, which, he said, "you heard from me;
zh: 耶穌和他們一同吃飯的時候，吩咐他們不要離開耶路撒冷，說：“你們要等候父的應許，就是你們聽我講過的，

en: for John baptized with water, but you will be baptized with the Holy Spirit not many days from now."
zh: 約翰是用水施洗，但再過幾天，你們要受聖靈的洗。”

en: So when they had come together, they asked him, "Lord, will you at this time restore the kingdom to Israel?"
zh: 他們聚集的時候，問耶穌說：“主啊，你要在這時候使以色列復國嗎？”

en: He said to them, "It is not for you to know times or seasons that the Father has fixed by his own authority.
zh: 耶穌說：“父憑著自己的權柄所定的時間或日期，你們不必知道。

en: But you will receive power when the Holy Spirit has come upon you, and you will be my witnesses in Jerusalem and in all Judea and Samaria, and to the end of the earth."
zh: 可是聖靈降臨在你們身上，你們就必領受能力，並且要在耶路撒冷、猶太全地、撒瑪利亞，直到地極，作我的見證人。”

en: And when he had said these things, as they were looking on, he was lifted up, and a cloud took him out of their sight.
zh: 說完了這話，他們還在看的時候，他被接上升，有一朵雲把他接去，就看不見他了。

en: And while they were gazing into heaven as he went, behold, two men stood by them in white robes,
zh: 當他往上升，他們定睛望天的時候，忽然有兩個人，身穿白衣，站在他們旁邊，

en: and said, "Men of Galilee, why do you stand looking into heaven? This Jesus, who was taken up from you into heaven, will come in the same way as you saw him go into heaven."
zh: 說：“加利利人哪，為甚麼站著望天呢？這位被接升天離開你們的耶穌，你們看見他怎樣往天上去，他也要怎樣回來。”

en: Then they returned to Jerusalem from the mount called Olivet, which is near Jerusalem, a Sabbath day's journey away.
zh: 後來，他們從橄欖山回到耶路撒冷。那山靠近耶路撒冷，有一安息日可走的路程。

en: And when they had entered, they went up to the upper room, where they were staying, Peter and John and James and Andrew, Philip and Thomas, Bartholomew and Matthew, James the son of Alphaeus and Simon the Zealot and Judas the son of James.
zh: 他們進了城，上了一間樓房，就是彼得、約翰、雅各、安得烈、腓力、多馬、巴多羅邁、馬太、亞勒腓的兒子雅各、激進派的西門、雅各的兒子猶大等人所住的。

en: All these with one accord were devoting themselves to prayer, together with the women and Mary the mother of Jesus, and his brothers.
zh: 這些人和幾個婦女，耶穌的母親馬利亞，還有他的兄弟們，都在一起，同心地恆切禱告。

en: In those days Peter stood up among the brothers (the company of persons was in all about 120) and said,
zh: 那時，約有一百二十人聚會，彼得在眾弟兄中間站起來說：

en: "Brothers, the Scripture had to be fulfilled, which the Holy Spirit spoke beforehand by the mouth of David concerning Judas, who became a guide to those who arrested Jesus.
zh: “弟兄們，經上的話，就是聖靈藉著大衛的口，預言那領人捉拿耶穌的猶大的事，是一定會應驗的。

en: For he was numbered among us and was allotted his share in this ministry."
zh: 他本是我們中間的一個，一同領受了這職分。

en: (Now this man bought a field with the reward of his wickedness, and falling headlong he burst open in the middle and all his bowels gushed out.
zh: 他用不義的酬勞買了一塊田，結果倒頭栽了下去，腹破腸流。

en: And it became known to all the inhabitants of Jerusalem, so that the field was called in their own language Akeldama, that is, Field of Blood.)
zh: 這事住在耶路撒冷的人全都知道，所以按當地的話，那塊地稱為亞革大馬，意思就是‘血田’。

en: "For it is written in the Book of Psalms, "' May his camp become desolate, and let there be no one to dwell in it'; and "'Let another take his office.'
zh: 因為詩篇上寫著： ‘願他的住處變為荒場， 無人居在其中。’ 又說： ‘願別人取代他的職分。’

en: So one of the men who have accompanied us during all the time that the Lord Jesus went in and out among us,
zh: 所以，從約翰施洗起，直到主離開我們被接上升的那天為止，當他在我們中間來往的時候，那些跟我們常在一起的人中，應該有一個人出來與我們一同作耶穌復活的見證人。”

en: beginning from the baptism of John until the day when he was taken up from us- one of these men must become with us a witness to his resurrection."
And they put forward two, Joseph called Barsabbas, who was also called Justus, and Matthias.
zh: 於是他們提出兩個人：約瑟 和馬提亞，

en: And they prayed and said, "You, Lord, who know the hearts of all, show which one of these two you have chosen
zh: 就禱告說：“主啊！你知道萬人的心，求你從這兩個人中，指明你要揀選誰，

en: to take the place in this ministry and apostleship from which Judas turned aside to go to his own place."
zh: 來承擔這使徒的職位和工作。這職位猶大已經放棄，往他自己的地方去了。”

en: And they cast lots for them, and the lot fell on Matthias, and he was numbered with the eleven apostles.
zh: 大家就為他們抽籤，結果抽中了馬提亞，他就與十一使徒同列。
